title: Update storybook
summary: Bumps storybook from ^9.1.10 to ^9.1.17 across root package.json, client-sdks/react/package.json, and packages/playground-ui/package.json to address Dependabot security alert #734. Also adds a storybook override in the root pnpm overrides. Changes are limited to 3 package.json files and pnpm-lock.yaml.
maintainerNotes: This PR has merge conflicts and a failing E2E test check. It has been stale for 54 days with no review activity. The reviewer requested (abhiaiyer91) never reviewed. The security vulnerability it addresses (dependabot/734) may have been resolved through other lockfile updates since January. Before reviving, check if dependabot alert #734 is still open. If so, rebase onto main, resolve conflicts, and re-run CI. If the alert is already resolved, close this PR.
